DISCOVERY 612, NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: PETITIONER'S MOTION TO DISMISS RESPONDENT'S DEMAND FOR ARBITRATION FOR FAILURE TO OBEY THIS COURT'S PRIOR DISCOVERY ORDER IS GRANTED AS TO RESPONDENT STEVEN CHANG. NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED. THE COURT FINDS THAT FURTHER ORDERS TO RESPOND WOULD NOT RESULT IN COMPLIANCE. AS TO RESPONDENT JAYNRY MAK, THE MOTION TO DISMISS IS DENIED. (612/EAHEWLETT)
